company_context: AI-Powered Graph Database for Real-Time Analytics & Connected Data | TigerGraph Contact Us Contact Us Solve Your Biggest Challenges: Fraud Detection Entity Resolution Anti-Money Laundering (AML) Product Recommendations Customer 360 Supply Chain Management Cybersecurity Threat Detection Financial Crime TigerGraph is the enterprise leader in AI and graph database technology, delivering unlimited parallel storage and computation to power your most critical business needs—from fraud detection, entity resolution, KYC/AML, and more. Start Free Trusted by global enterprises See What Others Can't: With an AI-Powered Graph Database Traditional databases store data in isolation. TigerGraph's advanced graph database technology connects your data to reveal the relationships that drive breakthrough insights—fraud rings, entity resolution, recommendation engines, customer 360, supply chain bottlenecks, and customer journey optimization—the connections that change everything and flat data can't uncover. 1000x Faster Than Traditional DBs <100ms Complex Query Response. Petabyte Scale Graph Processing. Uncover Hidden Connections With a Graph Database Companies waste billions and billions annually making decisions with isolated data. Your most valuable insights live in the relationships between your data points. While traditional analytics show you what happened, our graph analytics platform reveals why it happened and predicts what’s next. Before without Traditional Data Analytics, Flying Blind Traditional analytics only shows isolated data points and historical trends. Requires complex joins and multiple queries to understand relationships. Limited to 2-3 hop analysis before performance degrades. Literally unable to see how everything connects. X-Ray Vision with Graph Data Analytics, X-Ray Vision Graph Analytics reveals the full network of relationships instantly. Performs 10+ hop queries in milliseconds. Uncovers real-time hidden patterns and enables real time recommendations. Discovers the hidden relationships that drive your business. Graph RAG with Achieve Explainable and Accurate GenAI with GraphRAG Achieve Explainable and Accurate GenAI with GraphRAG Transform your AI applications with TigerGraph’s GraphRAG capabilities that deliver unprecedented accuracy and explainability in generative AI responses. advantage with Beyond Traditional RAG: The GraphRAG Advantage Beyond Traditional RAG: The GraphRAG Advantage Traditional RAG systems retrieve isolated documents, leading to incomplete context and hallucinations. TigerGraph’s graph database software enables GraphRAG to understand the interconnected nature of your knowledge base, providing AI with the full context of relationships between entities, concepts, and data points. The Enterprise-Scale Graph Database Built for Real-time AI and Analytics TigerGraph is a graph database purpose-built to analyze massive, highly connected data in real time and powering fraud detection, entity resolution, customer intelligen

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, Dr. Lee, I'm Alex from DeepData AI. We're a leading provider of AI-powered graph database solutions for real-time analytics and connected data. I came across your company, and I think our solution could help you with your current challenges in fraud detection and entity resolution.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (skeptical) Oh, another graph database solution. What makes you think you're better than the others we've already evaluated, like TigerGraph?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand you've probably seen a lot of solutions, but our DeepData AI platform is unique in its ability to handle massive amounts of data and provide real-time insights. We've had success with similar companies in the finance industry, helping them detect fraud rings and improve their AML processes. I'd love to show you a demo and discuss how our solution can address your specific pain points.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (concerned) I'm not sure we have the budget for another new technology right now. We've already invested heavily in our current systems, and I'm not convinced that your solution would be worth the cost.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand budget concerns, Dr. Lee. However, our solution has been proven to provide significant ROI for our clients. In fact, one of our customers in the financial sector saw a 30% reduction in fraud losses after implementing our platform. I'd be happy to provide a customized ROI analysis for your company to help you understand the potential benefits. Additionally, we offer flexible pricing models to fit your needs.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (still skeptical) Okay, that sounds interesting, but how does your solution integrate with our existing systems? We have a lot of legacy technology, and I don't want to have to rip and replace everything.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our platform is designed to be highly adaptable and can integrate with a wide range of systems, including legacy technologies. We've worked with companies with similar infrastructure, and our team can provide guidance and support to ensure a seamless integration. We also offer a trial period, so you can test our solution with your existing systems before making a commitment.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (somewhat convinced) Alright, I'll admit that I'm intrigued. But I'm still not sure if we're ready to move forward with a new solution right now. We're in the middle of our budgeting process, and I need to prioritize our initiatives.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand, Dr. Lee. Why don't we schedule a follow-up demo and discussion for next week? That will give you some time to consider our solution and how it aligns with your priorities. We can also discuss potential timelines and how our solution can fit into your budgeting process. Would that work for you?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Alright, let's schedule that demo for next Wednesday at 2 PM. I'll give you 30 minutes to show me what DeepData AI can do.

analysis.raw:
Score: 8
Outcome: Success
Key_Objection: Budget/Price
Feedback: The seller could have further emphasized the potential long-term cost savings and ROI of the solution to more effectively address the buyer's budget concerns. Sentiment: Neutral
